programme.desc: Legendary John Oates and Rome from "Sublime with Rome" discover and rediscover music. From Curtis Mayfield to My Morning Jacket, they cast a wide net narrowing down their top 5 vinyl.

programme.title: A Year in Music

programme.title: A Year in Music
programme.desc: In 2010, Linkin Park tops the charts while Katy Perry turns up the heat with California Gurls; Taylor and Kanye move on from their VMA clash, female artists rule and Bruno Mars drops his debut album.

programme.title: A Year in Music
programme.desc: Halestorm's Lzzy Hale looks at the music of 1965; The Beatles put on a mega concert; The Rolling Stones get no satisfaction and The Who is all about a new generation; Motown music brings artists to Detroit.

programme.title: A Year in Music
programme.desc: Host Lzzy Hale takes a look at how the music industry was affected by the COVID-19 pandemic and how artists, venues and the world adapted in 2020.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Country music takes center stage as we reveal the most unbelievable stories to have hit that world featuring notable artists such as The Chicks, Garth Brooks, LeAnn Rimes, Trisha Yearwood, The Allman Brothers and Reba McEntire.

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: Special guests including Gina Schock, Rikki Rockett and Finesse Mitchell unwrap the best "80s Christmas Songs.".

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: An Austrian teenager (Kirsten Dunst) marries the Dauphin (Jason Schwartzman) of France and becomes that country's queen following the death of King Louis XV (Judy Davis) in 1774. Years later, after a life of luxury and privilege, Marie Antoinette loses her head during the French Revolution.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Armed with nothing but a hatful of dreams, young chocolatier Willy Wonka manages to change the world, one delectable bite at a time.

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her n

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Scientists, soldiers and adventurers unite to explore a mythical, uncharted island in the Pacific Ocean. Cut off from everything they know, they venture into the domain of the mighty Kong, igniting the ultimate battle between man and nature. As their mission of discovery soon becomes one of survival, they must fight to escape from a primal world where humanity does not belong.

programme.title: Final Destination
programme.desc: Alex Browning is embarking on a trip to Paris. He experiences a premonition -- he sees the plane explode moments after leaving the ground. Insisting that everyone get off the plane, Alex and seven other people are forced to disembark. All watch as the plane actually explodes in a fireball. He and the other survivors have briefly cheated death, but will not be able to evade their fate for very long

programme.title: Final Destination 2
programme.desc: Kimberly (A.J. Cook) has a premonition of a horrible highway accident killing multiple people -- including her and her friends. She blocks the cars behind her on the ramp from joining traffic -- and as a police trooper (Michael Landes) arrives, the accident actually happens. Now, Death is stalking this group of mistaken survivors -- and one by one they are dying as they were supposed to on the hig

programme.title: Final Destination 5
programme.desc: During a bus ride with his colleagues to a corporate retreat, Sam (Nicholas D'Agosto) experiences a horrifying vision: the suspension bridge that they -- and many others -- are crossing starts to crumble around them. When his vision ends and, almost immediately, starts to come true, Sam takes quick action that saves a number of people, including his girlfriend, Molly (Emma Bell), and his best frie

programme.title: The Final Destination
programme.desc: While enjoying a day at the track, Nick O'Bannon (Bobby Campo) has a horrific premonition of his friends and him all dying in a freak accident involving many racecars. Mere seconds before the vision comes true, he manages to convince them to leave. Although they cheat death then, the survivors each begin to meet a grisly end, and Nick tries to figure a way to escape a similar fate.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: Leonard (Guy Pearce) is tracking down the man who raped and murdered his wife. The difficulty, however, of locating his wife's killer is compounded by the fact that he suffers from a rare, untreatable form of memory loss. Although he can recall details of life before his accident, Leonard cannot remember what happened fifteen minutes ago, where he's going, or why.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: When the disappearance of a local girl overshadows the abduction of another, a mother's search for the truth behind her daughter's disappearance uncovers a web of jealousy, deception and corruption in a small town.

programme.title: The House
programme.desc: Scott and Kate Johansen must figure out a way to earn some money after their daughter's scholarship falls through. When all else fails, the desperate couple join forces with their neighbor Frank to start an underground casino in his home. As the cash rolls in and the good times fly, Scott and Kate soon learn that they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Dim Sum Funeral
programme.desc: In the wake of her death, the embittered children of Chinese-American matriarch Mrs. Xiao (Lisa Lu) begrudgingly return to their childhood home for a bristly -- and brief, they hope -- reunion. But after Xiao's maid and sole confidant, Viola (Talia Shire), reveals her wish to undergo a week-long Buddhist funeral rite, the younger Xiaos -- including plastic surgeon Alexander (Russell Wong) and lesb

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: When a lively young family moves in next door, grumpy widower Otto Anderson meets his match in a quick-witted, pregnant woman named Marisol, leading to an unlikely friendship that turns his world upside down.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, the crotchety Willie T. Stokes (Billy Bob Thornton) and his partner (Tony Cox) reunite once a year for a holiday con. Posing as a mall Santa and his elf, they rip off shopping outlets on Christmas Eve. This year, however, Willie is falling apart. He's depressed and alcoholic, and his erratic behavior draws the suspicion of mall security (Bernie Mac). But when befriending a sma

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her n

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: John Form (Ward Horton) thinks he's found the perfect gift for his expectant wife, Mia (Annabelle Wallis) : a vintage doll in a beautiful white dress. However, the couple's delight doesn't last long: One terrible night, devil worshippers invade their home and launch a violent attack against the couple. When the cultists try to summon a demon, they smear a bloody rune on the nursery wall and drip b

programme.title: Annabelle Comes Home
programme.desc: Determined to keep Annabelle from wreaking more havoc, paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren lock the possessed doll in the artifacts room in their house. But when the doll awakens the room's evil spirits, it soon becomes an unholy night of terror for the couple's 10-year-old daughter, her friends and their young baby sitter.

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: Former toy maker Sam Mullins and his wife, Esther, are happy to welcome a nun and six orphaned girls into their California farmhouse. Years earlier, the couple's 7-year-old daughter Annabelle died in a tragic car accident. Terror soon strikes when one child sneaks into a forbidden room and finds a seemingly innocent doll that appears to have a life of its own.

programme.title: The Last Emperor
programme.desc: This sweeping account of the life of Pu Yi (John Lone), the last emperor of China, follows the leader's tumultuous reign. After being captured by the Red Army as a war criminal in 1950, Pu Yi recalls his childhood from prison. He remembers his lavish youth in the Forbidden City, where he was afforded every luxury but unfortunately sheltered from the outside world and complex political situation su

programme.title: Son of Godzilla
programme.desc: In this Japanese monster movie, the massive Godzilla comes to the aid of his newborn son, who hatches from an egg on a remote island where scientists are conducting experiments with radioactivity. Revealing a surprising paternal streak, Godzilla tries to teach his much smaller progeny how to use his powers. The father/son team must then battle giant insects, including praying mantises and a formid

programme.title: Supergirl
programme.desc: Kara (Helen Slater) of Argo City poses as Clark Kent's cousin, Linda Lee, to recover the Omegahedron from a witch (Faye Dunaway).

programme.title: Mississippi Masala
programme.desc: After Mina's (Sarita Choudhury) Indian family is ousted from their home in Uganda by dictator Idi Amin, they relocate to Mississippi to start a new life. Mina falls for Demetrius (Denzel Washington), a young carpet cleaner, despite the protestations of their families over their racial difference. The families and their surrounding communities begin to feud, putting even more pressure on the couple

programme.title: A Perfect Getaway
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cliff (Steve Zahn) and Cydney (Milla Jovovich) are celebrating their honeymoon by hiking through a secluded region of Hawaii. Their idyllic trek takes a dark turn when they find a group of frightened hikers who claim that another couple has been brutally murdered. Far from civilization and unsure who to trust, Cydney and Cliff soon get locked into a terrifying battle for survival.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: This animated tale follows the relationship between the small human-like Oms and their much larger blue-skinned oppressors, the Draags, who rule the planet of Ygam. While the Draags have long kept Oms as illiterate pets, this hierarchy shifts after an Om boy becomes educated, thanks to a young female Draag. This leads to an Om rebellion, which weakens the Draag control over their race. Will the Om

programme.title: Pirate Radio
programme.desc: In 1966, BBC radio broadcasts less than an hour of pop music a day, forcing pirate DJs to take up the slack from boats anchored outside British waters. Quentin (Bill Nighy) is the commander of such a pirate station, overseeing a host of seedy, lusty and dope-smoking DJs, including the Count (Philip Seymour Hoffman) and Dave (Nick Frost), who makes it his personal mission to see to it that Quentin'

programme.title: Nanny McPhee Returns
programme.desc: Enigmatic Nanny McPhee arrives on the doorstep of a harried mother, Isabel Green, who is trying to raise her kids and tend to the family farm while her husband is away at war. Isabel has her hands full of not only her own three, but also with her sister's spoiled pair. With no time to lose, McPhee uses magic to instill in the children five important lessons.

programme.title: The Daytrippers
programme.desc: Eliza D'Amico's (Hope Davis) seemingly idyllic marriage to Louis (Stanley Tucci) changes dramatically when she discovers what she believes to be a love letter to him from someone else. programme.title: Night on Earth
programme.desc: This film presents five stories, each involving a cab ride and set in a different city around the world. In Los Angeles, no-nonsense taxi driver Corky (Winona Ryder) gets an engaging customer in the form of a Hollywood casting agent (Gena Rowlands), while a Parisian cabbie (Isaach De Bankolé) must contend with some rowdy African diplomats. programme.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
programme.desc: The Green Lantern must race against time to stop Sinestro from unleashing a sinister plot.

programme.title: Green Lantern: Emerald Knights
programme.desc: New recruit Arisia (Elisabeth Moss) joins forces with Hal Jordan (Nathan Fillion) to save the universe from the forces of Krona.

programme.title: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk With Me

The killer is never apprehended, and, after experiencing dark visions and supernatural encounters, Agent Dale Cooper (Kyle MacLachlan) chillingly predicts that the culprit will claim another life. programme.title: Time Bandits
programme.desc: Young history buff Kevin (Craig Warnock) can scarcely believe it when six dwarfs emerge from his closet one night. Former employees of the Supreme Being (Ralph Richardson), they've purloined a map charting all the holes in the fabric of time and are using it to steal treasures from different historical eras. programme.title: Walkabout
programme.desc: Under the pretense of having a picnic, a geologist (John Meillon) takes his teenage daughter (Jenny Agutter) and 6-year-old son (Lucien John) into the Australian outback and attempts to shoot them. When he fails, he turns the gun on himself, and the two city-bred children must contend with harsh wilderness alone. programme.desc: After tracking down and arresting Earl Talbot Blake (John Lithgow), a psychotic hit man, rookie Los Angeles police officer Nick Styles (Denzel Washington) is hailed as a hero. programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: In the future, medical technology has advanced to the point where people can buy artificial organs to extend their lives. But if they default on payments, an organization known as the Union sends agents to repossess the organs. programme.title: The Art of Getting By
programme.desc: George (Freddie Highmore) is a senior at a posh Manhattan prep school, but his disaffected attitude leaves little room for toeing the line. He'd rather doodle and read philosophy, and he strenuously avoids his parents (Rita Wilson, Sam Robards) whenever possible. Unfortunately, George's attitude is endangering his chances of graduating. programme.title: Queer
programme.desc: Lee, a solitary American in Mexico City, falls for a beautiful, elusive former soldier. Journeying together into the jungle, Lee sees, for the first time, the possibility of an intimate and infinite love.

programme.title: Unlocked
programme.desc: After failing to apprehend the terrorist behind a Paris attack that claimed dozens of lives, CIA agent Alice Racine is forced to live in London as a caseworker. programme.title: Pawn
programme.desc: A robbery turns into a tense hostage situation when three gunmen hold up a diner the mob uses as a front.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Beneath Easter Island, in a giant factory that manufactures the world's Easter candy, the popular rabbit is preparing to pass the mantle to his son, E.B. (Russell Brand). programme.desc: Former cop Billy Taggart (Mark Wahlberg) sees a chance at redemption for past sins when New York City's Mayor Nicolas Hostetler (Russell Crowe) calls on him for a special job. programme.desc: Though they once seemed to have a bright future, life seems to be passing by the Norkowski sisters. Rose (Amy Adams), once the most popular girl in high school, is a single mom and works as a maid. Norah (Emily Blunt) still lives at home with their father (Alan Arkin) and parties all the time. programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falli

programme.title: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

programme.title: Christmas With the Kranks

programme.title: Adult Best Friends
programme.desc: Katie takes her best friend, Delaney, on a nostalgic trip to their childhood hometown to tell her she's getting married. Their journey soon takes some unexpected turns courtesy of a bizarre rental homeowner, a chance encounter with a former classmate, a bachelor party, and a few potential love interests.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: Dr. Burke Ryan (Aaron Eckhart) is a self-help guru who is on the verge of a lucrative multimedia deal. But there's a problem: though he advises his patients to confront their pain, Burke has never come to terms with his wife's death. Eloise Chandler (Jennifer Aniston) has had enough of men and dating, and is busy concentrating on her floral business. When they meet, Burke and Eloise feel an instan

programme.title: Opus
programme.desc: A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

programme.title: The Hole in the Ground
programme.desc: One night, Sarah's young son disappears into the woods behind their rural home. When he returns, he looks the same, but his behavior grows increasingly disturbing. Sarah begins to believe that the boy who returned may not be her son at all.

programme.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
programme.desc: This installment marks the return of the seemingly indestructible masked murderer Michael Myers (George P. Wilbur), who is targeting Tommy Doyle (Paul Stephen Rudd), a young man tied into the legacy of the killer and his connections with the Strode family. As the supernatural elements of Michael's macabre abilities are explored, his longtime adversary, Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), is also ba

programme.title: Halloween H20: 20 Years Later
programme.desc: Two decades after surviving a massacre on October 31, 1978, former babysitter Laurie Strode finds herself hunted by persistent knife-wielder Michael Myers. Laurie now lives in Northern California under an assumed name, where she works as the headmistress of a private school. But it's not far enough to escape Myers, who soon discovers her whereabouts. As Halloween descends upon Laurie's peaceful co

programme.title: Halloween: Resurrection
programme.desc: He's back for more... When a group of teens win a contest to spend a night in Michael Myers' childhood home to be broadcast live on the Internet, they believe they are in for a little fun and some free publicity. But things go frightfully wrong and the game turns into a struggle to make it out of the house alive.

programme.title: Taking Woodstock
programme.desc: In the summer of 1969, Elliot Tiber divides his time between Greenwich Village and the upstate ramshackle motel, El Monaco, of his Old World parents. When the proposed venue for the upcoming Woodstock concert falls through, Elliot steps in and plays a pivotal role in the generation-defining event by helping organizers secure Max Yasgur's nearby farm for the festival and offering the El Monaco as t

programme.title: Hitchcock
programme.desc: Following his great success with "North by Northwest," director Alfred Hitchcock makes a daring choice for his next project: an adaptation of Robert Bloch's novel "Psycho." When the studio refuses to back the picture, Hitchcock decides to pay for it himself in exchange for a percentage of the profits. His wife, Alma Reville, has serious reservations about the film but supports him nonetheless. Sti

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: Jaime Reyes suddenly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology called the Scarab. When the Scarab chooses Jaime to be its symbiotic host, he's bestowed with an incredible suit of armor that's capable of extraordinary and unpredictable powers, forever changing his destiny as he becomes the superhero Blue Beetle.

programme.title: All the President's Men
programme.desc: Two green reporters and rivals working for the Washington Post, Bob Woodward (Robert Redford) and Carl Bernstein (Dustin Hoffman), research the botched 1972 burglary of the Democratic Party Headquarters at the Watergate apartment complex. With the help of a mysterious source, code-named Deep Throat (Hal Holbrook), the two reporters make a connection between the burglars and a White House staffer.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Two strangers' lives become inextricably bound together after an error by an air traffic controller (Scoot McNairy) causes the death of a construction foreman's (Arnold Schwarzenegger) wife and daughter.

programme.title: Alex Cross
programme.desc: Alex Cross (Tyler Perry) works as a detective/psychologist for the Detroit Police Department along with his lifelong friend, Tommy Kane (Edward Burns), and detective Monica Ashe (Rachel Nichols). Cross' latest case puts him on a collision course with Picasso (Matthew Fox), a cunning serial killer whose ultimate target is multinational industrialist Giles Mercier (Jean Reno). Cross must find a way

programme.title: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: Locked away, a young woman named Babydoll retreats to a fantasy world where she is free to go wherever her mind takes her. Determined to fight for real freedom, she finds four women -- Rocket, Blondie, Amber and Sweet Pea -- to join together to escape the terrible fate that awaits them. With a virtual arsenal at their disposal, the allies battle everything from samurais to serpents, while trying t

programme.title: The Wolfman
programme.desc: Though absent from his ancestral home of Blackmoor for many years, aristocrat Lawrence Talbot returns to find his missing brother at the request of the latter's fiancée, Gwen. He learns that a creature has links to an ancient curse turning people into werewolves when the moon is full. To save the village and protect Gwen, he must slay the bloodthirsty beast, but he contends with a horrifying famil

programme.title: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Young Valerie (Amanda Seyfried) feels torn between two men. She loves Peter, but her parents intend that she marry wealthy Henry. Valerie and Peter are going to run away together, but her sister is killed by a werewolf before they can put their plan into action. The villagers call on the help of Father Solomon (Gary Oldman), a famous monster hunter who warns that the beast takes human form by day.

programme.title: 3 From Hell
programme.desc: Crazed killers Baby Firefly, Captain Spaulding and Otis Driftwood unleash bloody mayhem after escaping from prison.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Now that Chris and his girlfriend, Rose, have reached the meet-the-parents milestone of dating, she invites him for a weekend getaway with Missy and Dean. At first, Chris reads the family's overly accommodating behavior as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter's interracial relationship, but as the weekend progresses, a series of increasingly disturbing discoveries leads him to a truth that

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A weekend getaway at a remote cabin turns to chaos when it's revealed that one of the guests -- a subservient android built for human companionship -- has gone haywire.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Chief Warrant Officer Roy Miller and his team of inspectors are on a mission in 2003 to find Iraq's reported stockpiles of weapons of mass destruction. Traveling from one dangerous site to another, Miller and his team fail to find any chemical agents or other weapons. Instead, they discover an elaborate coverup in which the most-elusive weapon is truth.

programme.title: Mom and Dad Save the World
programme.desc: While planning to destroy Earth with a gigantic laser beam, Emperor Tod Spengo (Jon Lovitz), ruler of the planet Spengo, catches a glimpse of housewife Marge Nelson (Teri Garr) and becomes smitten with her. Beaming Marge and her husband, Dick (Jeffrey Jones), up to Spengo from California, the daft, dimwitted leader tries to woo her, and sends her spouse to prison. Soon Dick is plotting an insurgen

programme.title: The House
programme.desc: Scott and Kate Johansen must figure out a way to earn some money after their daughter's scholarship falls through. When all else fails, the desperate couple join forces with their neighbor Frank to start an underground casino in his home. As the cash rolls in and the good times fly, Scott and Kate soon learn that they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After ratting out his Mafia cohorts, Giovanni Manzoni (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a French town. Despite the best efforts of their handler (Tommy Lee Jones) to keep them in line, Giovanni (now called Fred Blake), his wife (Michelle Pfeiffer) and children (Dianna Agron, John D'Leo) can't help but resort to doing things the "family" way. Howev

programme.title: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Minor-league baseball announcer Artie Decker (Billy Crystal) and his wife, Diane (Bette Midler), get to see their only child, Alice (Marisa Tomei), very seldom. To their surprise, Alice and her husband (Tom Everett Scott) ask them to watch their children so they can embark on a trip for work. It promises to be a fun time for all, until the three young ones turn out to be quite a handful for this o

programme.title: Adult Best Friends
programme.desc: Katie takes her best friend, Delaney, on a nostalgic trip to their childhood hometown to tell her she's getting married. Their journey soon takes some unexpected turns courtesy of a bizarre rental homeowner, a chance encounter with a former classmate, a bachelor party, and a few potential love interests.

programme.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
programme.desc: This installment marks the return of the seemingly indestructible masked murderer Michael Myers (George P. Wilbur), who is targeting Tommy Doyle (Paul Stephen Rudd), a young man tied into the legacy of the killer and his connections with the Strode family. As the supernatural elements of Michael's macabre abilities are explored, his longtime adversary, Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), is also ba

programme.title: Halloween H20: 20 Years Later
programme.desc: Two decades after surviving a massacre on October 31, 1978, former babysitter Laurie Strode finds herself hunted by persistent knife-wielder Michael Myers. Laurie now lives in Northern California under an assumed name, where she works as the headmistress of a private school. But it's not far enough to escape Myers, who soon discovers her whereabouts. As Halloween descends upon Laurie's peaceful co

programme.title: Canyon Passage
programme.desc: Frontier western starring Dana Andrews. An ambitious businessman journeys to rural Oregon where a complex web of life and love waits to ensnare him. Directed by Jacques Tourneur.

programme.title: The Comancheros
programme.desc: Western starring John Wayne and Stuart Whitman. A Texas Ranger is forced to team up with his prisoner while he's on a covert mission to take on a band of thieves and gunrunners.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: Second World War drama about a warship assigned to mail runs but that ends up engaged in battle anyway, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford and Marguerite Chapman.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: George Clooney's fact-based World War II comedy-drama starring Matt Damon. Art experts form a unit to stop the Nazis stealing or destroying important cultural artefacts.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: Jalmari Helander's ultra-violent, Nazi-slaying survival adventure starring Jorma Tommila. A bunch of Nazis try to steal a grizzled Finnish ex-soldier's gold. But he ain't having it.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
programme.desc: Sci-fi action sequel with Linda Hamilton and Arnold Schwarzenegger. A factory worker is targeted by deadly robot assassins from the future. Thank goodness he's back.

programme.title: Enys Men
programme.desc: Time and memory become jumbled in Mark Jenkin's eerie, expressionist folk horror about a woman researching wild flowers on a remote island Cornwall's coast. With Mary Woodvine.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Western romance starring Joel McCrea and Sonny Tufts as a couple of cowboys who compete for the affections of a new schoolteacher from out east, played by Barbara Britton.

programme.title: The Black Shield of Falworth
programme.desc: Medieval action-adventure starring Tony Curtis and Janet Leigh. When a peasant discovers his true lineage, he sets out to woo his noble sweetheart and avenge his father's murder.

programme.title: Criss Cross
programme.desc: Muscular film noir starring Burt Lancaster and Yvonne De Carlo. A dame convinces her ex-husband, an armoured car guard, to come in on a daring robbery.

programme.title: Twelve O'Clock High
programme.desc: World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Jerry & Marge Go Large
programme.desc: Fact-based comedy starring Bryan Cranston and Annette Bening as a retired couple who find a way to exploit a lottery loophole. But then some rich kids try to muscle in..

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Dark sci-fi action with Tom Hardy as Marvel's anti-hero. A reporter becomes inhabited by a ferocious extraterrestrial that has its own ideas on how to behave. With Michelle Williams.

programme.title: T2 Trainspotting
programme.desc: Ewan McGregor, Ewen Bremner, Robert Carlyle and Jonny Lee Miller star in Danny Boyle's sequel to the classic darkly comedic drama. Renton returns to Edinburgh after 20 years away..

programme.title: The Egyptian
programme.desc: In ancient Egypt, Sinuhe (Edmund Purdom) is a would-be doctor who saves the life of a young man (Michael Wilding) suffering from a seizure. When the afflicted youth awakes, he introduces himself as the Pharaoh Akhnaton and makes Sinuhe the royal healer. programme.title: Surf Party
programme.desc: An Arizona gal (Patricia Morrow) and her friends enjoy sun, sand and romance when they drive out to California for a surfing vacation.

programme.title: Down Argentine Way
programme.desc: In the United States, Glenda Crawford (Betty Grable) buys a horse from Argentinian Ricardo Quintana (Don Ameche), but the sale is canceled when the latter's father, Casiano (J. programme.title: The French Dispatch
programme.desc: A love letter to journalists set in an outpost of an American newspaper in a fictional 20th-century French city that brings to life a collection of stories published in "The French Dispatch.".

programme.title: Amsterdam
programme.desc: In 1933 three close friends find themselves at the center of one of the most shocking secret plots in American history.

programme.desc: Jojo is a lonely German boy who discovers that his single mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their attic. Aided only by his imaginary friend -- Adolf Hitler -- Jojo must confront his blind nationalism as World War II continues to rage on.

programme.title: Girls Trip

Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: Rocket Science
programme.desc: High-school student Hal Hefner's (Reece Daniel Thompson) life is falling down around him. His parents have split, his brother picks on him incessantly, and he has a terrible stutter. Hal cannot believe it when Ginny Ryerson (Anna Kendrick), a pretty classmate, asks him to join their school's debate team. Falling head over heels in love with Ginny, he agrees to her request, with unexpected results.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

programme.title: Sex and the City 2

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
programme.desc: In Mexico City, a newly modified liquid Terminator -- the Rev-9 model -- arrives from the future to kill a young factory worker named Dani Ramos. Also sent back in time is Grace, a hybrid cyborg human who must protect Ramos from the seemingly indestructible robotic assassin. But the two women soon find some much-needed help from a pair of unexpected allies -- seasoned warrior Sarah Connor and the

programme.title: The Corrupted
programme.desc: Released from prison, a talented boxer wants nothing more than to reconnect with his young son and live a quiet life. But when his brother gets on the wrong side of a shady developer, he must risk everything to save his sibling before it's too late.

programme.title: American Son
programme.desc: A freshly graduated Marine returns home to his dysfunctional family for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Best of Me
programme.desc: Amanda and Dawson, who were once high-school sweethearts, have a bittersweet reunion when they return to their hometown for the funeral of a mutual friend. Seeing each other again after 20 years apart reignites the love they've never forgotten, but Amanda and Dawson soon discover that the forces that drove them apart when they were younger pose even more threats today.

programme.title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla
programme.desc: Lorine Padilla joins a street gang in the Bronx, N.Y., before becoming an activist and spiritual adviser.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: Tom Cruise and Cameron Crowe reunite after "Jerry Maguire" for "Vanilla Sky," the story of a young New York City publishing magnate who finds himself on an unexpected roller-coaster ride of romance, comedy, suspicion, love, sex and dreams in a mind-bending search for his soul.

programme.title: The Woman in Black
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps, a lawyer, is recently widowed and grieving the loss of his wife when he is sent to a remote village to put a deceased eccentric's affairs in order. Soon after his arrival, it becomes clear that the villagers are hiding a terrible secret. Kipps discovers that his late client's house is haunted by the spirit of a woman who is trying to find someone and something she lost, and that no o

programme.title: The Edge of Seventeen
programme.desc: Everyone knows that growing up is hard, and life is no easier for high school junior Nadine (Hailee Steinfeld), who is already at peak awkwardness when her all-star older brother Darian (Blake Jenner) starts dating her best friend Krista (Haley Lu Richardson). programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After an outlaw named Tom Chaney murders her father, feisty 14-year-old farm girl Mattie Ross hires Rooster Cogburn, a boozy, trigger-happy lawman, to help her find Chaney and avenge her father. The bickering duo are not alone in their quest, for a Texas Ranger named LaBoeuf is also tracking Chaney for reasons of his own. programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Ignacio (Jack Black), or Nacho to his friends, works as a cook in the Mexican monastery where he grew up. programme.title: Most Wanted
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: Day of the Fight
programme.desc: On the day of his first fight since his release from prison, a former boxing champion reconnects with his trainer, ex-wife, childhood friend, and abusive father in a quest for forgiveness and closure.

programme.title: Ali

Fighting all comers, Ali took on the law, conventions, the status quo and the war -- as well as the fists in front of him. programme.title: Million Dollar Baby
programme.desc: Frankie Dunn (Clint Eastwood) is a veteran Los Angeles boxing trainer who keeps almost everyone at arm's length, except his old friend and associate Eddie "Scrap Iron" Dupree (Morgan Freeman). programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Captain John Miller (Tom Hanks) takes his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Surrounded by the brutal realties of war, while searching for Ryan, each man embarks upon a personal journey and discovers their own strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honor, decency and courage.

programme.title: Before We Vanish
programme.desc: Three aliens travel to Earth on a mission in preparation for a mass invasion. Having taken possession of human bodies, the visitors rob their hosts of the very essence of their being, leaving psychological and spiritual devastation in their wake.

programme.title: Memories of Murder

programme.title: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Vassili is a young Russian sharpshooter who becomes a legend when a savvy political officer makes him the hero of his propaganda campaign. Their friendship is threatened when both men fall in love with a beautiful female soldier. programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: The true story of Molly Bloom, a beautiful, young, Olympic-class skier who ran the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by 17 FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally, unbeknown to her, the Russian mob. Her only ally was her criminal defense lawyer

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as Capt. Timothy Close and his Coast Guard crew launch a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Based on the popular Tom Clancy novel, this suspenseful movie tracks Soviet submarine captain Marko Ramius as he abandons his orders and heads for the east coast of the United States. Equipped with innovative stealth technology, Ramius' submarine, "Red October," is virtually invisible. However, when an American sub briefly detects the Russians' presence, CIA agent Jack Ryan sets out to determine R

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Dr. Indiana Jones, a renowned archeologist and expert in the occult, is hired by the U.S. Government to find the ark of the covenant, which is believed to still hold the Ten Commandments. Unfortunately, Hitler's agents are also after the ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion escape from various close scrapes in a quest that takes them from Nepal to Cairo.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: An art collector appeals to Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. He learns that another archaeologist has disappeared while searching for the precious goblet, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones. The artifact is much harder to find than they expected, and its powers are too much for those impure in heart.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: It's the height of the Cold War, and famous archaeologist Indiana Jones (Harrison Ford), returning from his latest adventure, finds out his job at Marshall College is in jeopardy. programme.title: Gladiator

programme.title: NYC Point Gods

programme.title: The Resurgence: DeMarcus Cousins
programme.desc: A documentary following DeMarcus Cousins while he recovers from an injury that has been a career death sentence for some NBA players; featuring exclusive interviews with teammates, coaches and NBA insiders.

programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: The Silent Planet
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail

programme.desc: Gal Gadot stars as an Amazon warrior princess who leaves her hidden island home to fight in the Great War.

programme.title: Clash Of The Titans
programme.desc: Hero Sam Worthington embarks on an epic quest to take vengeance on wrathful god Ralph Fiennes. Mythological action with Liam Neeson. Fantasy violence/flashing images.

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: The Holy Roman Empire where Europe's nations fiercely vie for supremacy and the Austrians, desiring more land, encroach upon Switzerland, a serene, pastoral nation.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as a primatologist who must ride to the rescue when gentle gorilla George is transformed into a raging monster.

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Suburban dad Hutch, a former lethal assassin, is pulled back into his violent past after a home invasion, setting off a chain of events.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Sci-fi action with Jason Statham, who must come face to face with a shark as he helps a research team stuck at the bottom of the Pacific.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: A biochemist with a rare blood disease inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism. Marvel action with Jared Leto.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as legendary warrior Achilles, leading the armies of ancient Greece into battle against Troy. Sword-and-sandal epic with Eric Bana. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Gal Gadot stars as an Amazon warrior princess who leaves her hidden island home to fight in the Great War.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: Hot shot pilot Ryan Reynolds is given superpowers after joining intergalactic peace-keeping force, the Green Lantern Corps. Comic book adventure. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Tom Holland is Peter Parker - an average kid with a web-slinging alter ego out to protect New York from a menacing new villain.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Balancing alien heritage with a human upbringing, Superman is drawn into a conflict that challenges his belief in truth and justice.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Care

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A lawyer whose underhand ploys to win cases leave him little time to see his son discovers he is incapable of lying after the boy's birthday wish makes his dad tell only the truth. However, this causes a host of problems as the attorney tries to muddle his way through a high-profile divorce settlement. Comedy, with Jim Carrey, Maura Tierney, Justin Cooper, Jennifer Tilly and Cary Elwes.

programme.title: Hostages
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owen's comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: The eccentric pet detective is coaxed out of self-imposed exile in a Buddhist monastery to visit Africa and help search for a sacred white bat. However, his unique investigative talents are tested to the limits as he faces a race against time to find the missing creature and prevent a tribal war. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey, Simon Callow and Bob Gunton.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Frank the sausage and the other groceries are promised of the great beyond. When he hears life after the supermarket isn't as much fun as he thought, Frank the sausage investigates. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Seth Rogen, Kristen Wiig, Jonah Hill and Michael Cera.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: Lifelong pals Lucy and Jane face a test of friendship when one of them embarks on a personal journey. Romantic comedy drama, starring Dakota Johnson, Sonoya Mizuno and Jermaine Fowler.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: The eccentric pet detective is coaxed out of self-imposed exile in a Buddhist monastery to visit Africa and help search for a sacred white bat. However, his unique investigative talents are tested to the limits as he faces a race against time to find the missing creature and prevent a tribal war. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey, Simon Callow and Bob Gunton.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Two irresponsible salesmen find themselves in trouble with the law after crashing their truck. To avoid jail, they agree to undertake community service looking after a couple of troubled kids. However, it soon seems that going to prison would have been the easier option. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Seann William Scott and Christopher Mintz-Plasse.

programme.title: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Mexican woman is offered a well-paid job as housekeeper to a wealthy American celebrity chef, and relocates with her daughter to Los Angeles - but her employer's neurotic wife causes all sorts of problems. Comedy directed by James L Brooks, starring Paz Vega, Adam Sandler, Tea Leoni and Cloris Leachman.

programme.title: The Ballad of Wallis Island
programme.desc: Old tensions resurface when ex-bandmates who were former lovers reunite for a private show at the island home of an eccentric millionaire. Comedy drama, written by and starring Tim Key and Tom Basden, with Carey Mulligan and Sian Clifford.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Roman

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman.

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A female journalist sets out to demonstrate how women manage to put off prospective partners, and spies the perfect man on whom to test her theories. However, the experiment takes an unexpected turn thanks to her guinea pig, who has a hidden agenda of his own. Romantic comedy, starring Kate Hudson, Matthew McConaughey, Adam Goldberg and Michael Michele.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Icelandic romantic drama. Spanning several decades, a man embarks on an emotional journey to find his first love who disappeared 50 years ago.

programme.title: Empire Of The Sun
programme.desc: Spoilt youngster Christian Bale fights to survive a Japanese POW camp alongside American scrounger John Malkovich. Epic WWII drama from Steven Spielberg.

programme.title: About A Boy
programme.desc: Lonely kid Nicholas Hoult finds a reluctant father figure in detached bachelor Hugh Grant in this heartwarming comedy based on a book by Nick Hornby. With Toni Collette.

programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: Aaron Sorkin makes his directorial debut with this truth-based drama charting the remarkable rise and fall of poker queen Molly Bloom. Jessica Chastain and Idris Elba star.(140 mins.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: In WWII, while the men are on the battlefield, the women are on the playing field. Tom Hanks and Madonna star in a feelgood baseball tale.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: A couple start to unravel after welcoming the lead actor in a movie about their notorious romance into their home. Sky Original with Julianne Moore and Natalie Portman.

programme.title: Plainclothes
programme.desc: A promising undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies professional orders when he falls in love with a target. Language/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: A young woman escapes her war-torn country to a Greek island, growing close with a tour guide as the pair find hope in each other. Drama.

programme.title: Turtles All The Way Down
programme.desc: Anxious teen Aza wants to be a good daughter and friend - but battles an endless barrage of invasive thoughts. Romantic drama.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Trapped and depleted, the British Army attempt to carry out a desperate evacuation of northern France. Gripping WWII epic from Christopher Nolan, starring Tom Hardy.

programme.desc: Anxious teen Aza wants to be a good daughter and friend - but battles an endless barrage of invasive thoughts. Romantic drama.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru

programme.title: DC League Of Super Pets
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as the voice of Krypto the Super-Dog, who must convince a rag-tag shelter pack to rescue the Justice League.

programme.desc: The grumpy ogre returns as Shrek deals with impending fatherhood and the call to be King of Far Far Away. Star-studded animated sequel.

programme.desc: Two kids discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and their grandfather's legacy. Paul Rudd stars.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: Jason Issacs plays Hook in this captivating adaptation of the classic tale. Rachel Hurd-Wood plays Wendy, who is whisked away to Neverland by the Lost Boys. Flashing images.(109mins).

programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as the voice of Krypto the Super-Dog, who must convince a rag-tag shelter pack to rescue the Justice League.

programme.title: Super Charlie
programme.desc: Willie's dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives, who turns out to have actual superpowers.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, washed-up magician Elijah Wood, takes her on a wild adventure. Family fun.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: In this modern twist on a classic fairy tale, a princess is taken by an evil sorcerer. As her fiancé sets out to find her, she plots her daring escape.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Family adventure about a gas-guzzling monster that takes up residence in the truck of downtrodden high-schooler Lucas Till.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Struggling to find his inner meh, multi-expressional livewire Gene embarks on a daring app-venture to find notorious hacker Jailbreak. Animation.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: Two kids discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and their grandfather's legacy. Paul Rudd stars.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A man trapped inside a magical boardgame is freed with a zoo-full of rampaging jungle beasts. Wild fantasy adventure with Robin Williams.

programme.desc: The grumpy ogre returns as Shrek deals with impending fatherhood and the call to be King of Far Far Away. Star-studded animated sequel.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back as Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart and Jack Black return to Jumanji.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: Animated comedy about a youngster concerned that his baby brother is actually a power-hungry tycoon sent to destroy his perfect family life.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A young mystic must learn to control the elements to save his kingdom from a destructive war. Action-packed adaptation of the hit animation. Moderate violence.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: Thief Janet Leigh makes a mistake when she checks into Anthony Perkins' secluded motel. Alfred Hitchcock directs this groundbreaking thriller. Violence.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when he thought it was safe to get back in the water, Brody (Roy Scheider) must protect Amity Island from another marauding shark. Thriller. Flashing images.

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: On an empty highway, a couple break down. Kurt Russell stays with the car, his wife accepts a lift from a redneck trucker... then disappears. Nail-biting desert thriller.

programme.title: ...And Justice For All
programme.desc: Al Pacino, an idealistic lawyer trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system, finds himself defending a self-righteous judge. Satirical drama.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: A Florida theme park has an unwelcome visitor: a Great White with a grudge. Tasty sequel with Dennis Quaid in for a short, shark shock! Violence/sex.

programme.title: Enter The Dragon
programme.desc: Bruce Lee is the martial artist competing with international bruisers and cracking an opium racket in his spare time. Classic action. Violent scenes.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: Stanley Kubrick's controversial classic about an off-the-wall gang who embark on a violent crime spree. Malcolm McDowell stars. Violence/mature themes.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood directs his second feature and stars as a hired gun charged with saving a small town from a gang of outlaws. Western starring Verna Bloom and Marianna Hill.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: Mob moll Gloria (Oscar-nominated Gena Rowlands) rescues a six year-old boy after his family is wiped out by gangsters. Cult crime thriller directed by John Cassavetes.

programme.desc: Al Pacino, an idealistic lawyer trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system, finds himself defending a self-righteous judge. Satirical drama.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: Thief Janet Leigh makes a mistake when she checks into Anthony Perkins' secluded motel. Alfred Hitchcock directs this groundbreaking thriller. Violence.

programme.title: Anatomy Of A Murder
programme.desc: Semi-retired lawyer James Stewart takes on the dark case of an army lieutenant accused of murder. Gripping courtroom drama with Lee Remick.

programme.title: Enter The Dragon
programme.desc: Bruce Lee is the martial artist competing with international bruisers and cracking an opium racket in his spare time. Classic action. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: A Florida theme park has an unwelcome visitor: a Great White with a grudge. Tasty sequel with Dennis Quaid in for a short, shark shock! Violence/sex.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage returns from Vietnam to find his childhood friend, Birdy (Matthew Modine) psychologically crushed by the war. Haunting drama. Contains strong language/sex.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: Allied POWs are ready for a soccer match versus Germany in Nazi Paris, while French Resistance and British officers plot the team's daring escape to freedom.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Veteran cop Danny Glover and maverick Mel Gibson team up to thwart drug-smugglers. Strong language/violence/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: Ultraviolent gangster epic from Brian De Palma. Al Pacino is the ambitious Cuban immigrant who builds a drug empire. Strong language/violence/drugs/flashing images.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBI's top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaw's older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

programme.title: Fast & Furious 8
programme.desc: Street racing criminal Dominic Toretto is drawn out of retirement by an encounter with a ruthless cyberterrorist, who recruits him for an international criminal scheme. As he sets out to steal the technology she needs to unleash chaos on the world, he is drawn into conflict with both old enemies and his former gang. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Charlize Theron, Dwayne Johnson and

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: In a move to identify suspected hijackers, an undercover police officer infiltrates the high-octane world of illegal late-night street racing by rival gangs. He is befriended by a champion driver, but when he also forms a bond with the racer's sister, he is pitched into a conflict of loyalties. Thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: News of a friend's murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian O'Conner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez
